availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - See Kruger's comments + in Krueger's comment on lin1 delete ! after ⲡⲡⲣ̣; lin3=> ⲁⲃⲣⲁϩⲁⲙ <:<:ⲛ̣|alt|ⲡ̣:>=PN L. Vanderheyden (photograph)|ed|[.?]:><:διάκονος=grc|reg|([ⲇⲓⲁ]4.- ⲕ(ⲟⲛⲟⲥ):>:> in accordance with Krueger's comment on the Greek reg; lin4=> ⲧⲥⲁⲛⲟ*word-sep-apostrophe*; the rest of the text is good to me.

Vote - AcceptText - Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.
Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.
lin1=> <:<ⲡⲉ><:πρεσβύτερος=grc|reg|(ⲡⲣ̣(ⲉⲥⲃⲩⲧⲉⲣⲟⲥ)):>=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲡⲡⲣ̣!:> lin2=> <:ⲉⲧϣ[ⲧⲱⲣⲉ(?)]|alt|ⲉⲧϣ[ⲓⲛⲉ(?)]:> lin3=> ⲁⲃⲣⲁϩⲁⲙ [ⲛ<:διάκονος=grc|reg|([ⲇⲓⲁ]4.- ⲕ(ⲟⲛⲟⲥ):> (could theoretically be διάκων instead, how to encode this?) lin4=> ⲡ<:σκήνωμα=grc|reg|ⲥⲕⲩ̣ⲛ̣[ⲱⲙⲁ(?)]:> lin6=> ⲛ̄ⲧⲱ̣[ⲃ(?)]6.- ⲉ

Submit - Added text according to O.Crum 92. Maybe another Greek loanword in lin4 ⲡⲥⲕⲩ̣ⲛ̣[.?]. I was not sure. Added diaeresis in lin2 and supralinear strokes in lins3 and 5 from the image. Please check that I got them right. Resolved to καί in lin4. I hope that is correct.

div.p: Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible. Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.

div.ab:
ⲁⲛⲟⲕ ⲡⲉπρεσβύτεροςⲡⲣⲉⲥⲃⲩⲧⲉⲣⲟⲥⲡⲡⲣ ϩⲉⲣ
ⲉⲧⲛⲏ ⲉⲧⲥϩⲁⲓ ⲉⲧϣⲧⲱⲣⲉⲉⲧϣⲓⲛⲉ
ⲛⲡⲉⲧⲣⲟⲥ ⲙⲛ ⲁⲃⲣⲁϩⲁⲙ ⲛⲡδιάκονοςⲇⲓⲁ
ⲕⲟⲛⲟⲥⲇⲓⲁ
ⲕⲱⲛⲛδιάκονοςⲇⲓⲁ
ⲕⲟⲛⲟⲥ ϫⲉ ϣⲁⲩⲧⲥⲁⲛⲟ ⲡσκήνωμαⲥⲕⲩⲛⲱⲙⲁ
ⲛⲁⲡⲁ ⲍⲁⲏⲗ ϣⲁ ⲡϣⲁ ⲛⲧⲱⲃ
ⲉ ⲁⲩⲱ ϯκινδυνεύεινⲕⲓⲛⲇⲉⲛⲉⲩⲉ ϩⲁⲣ
ⲟⲟⲩ ⲁⲛⲟⲕ ⲡⲉⲧⲣⲟⲥ ϯκινδυνεύεινⲕ
ⲓⲛⲇⲉⲛⲉⲩⲉ ⲟⲛ ϩⲁ
ϩⲏⲃⲥ
